entityName.description: Full name of the related entity

displayPropertyName.description: Property name to display from the related entity

access.description: Access level for managing this relation from the referenced entity side. When set to 'view' or 'edit', the referenced entity can see/manage items that reference it.

dependsOn.description: Cascading dependency: filter this FK's lookup by the value of another FK property on the same entity.

propertyName.description: The property name on the owning entity whose value provides the filter (e.g. 'CountryId' on Author)

filterPropertyName.description: The property name on the target (lookup) entity to filter by (e.g. 'CountryId' on City)
